com.zwo

类 ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.zwo.ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE
  • 封闭类:
    ASIConstants

    public static class ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE
extends java.lang.Object

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static int ASI_ERROR_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL
      buffer size is not big enough
      static int ASI_ERROR_CAMERA_CLOSED
      camera didn't open
      static int ASI_ERROR_CAMERA_REMOVED
      failed to find the camera, maybe the camera has been removed
      static int ASI_ERROR_END 
      static int ASI_ERROR_EXPOSURE_IN_PROGRESS 
      static int ASI_ERROR_GENERAL_ERROR
      general error, eg: value is out of valid range
      static int ASI_ERROR_INVALID_CONTROL_TYPE
      invalid control type
      static int ASI_ERROR_INVALID_FILEFORMAT 
      static int ASI_ERROR_INVALID_ID
      invalid ID
      static int ASI_ERROR_INVALID_IMGTYPE
      unsupported image formate
      static int ASI_ERROR_INVALID_INDEX
      no camera connected or index value out of boundary
      static int ASI_ERROR_INVALID_PATH
      cannot find the path of the file
      static int ASI_ERROR_INVALID_SEQUENCE
      stop capture first
      static int ASI_ERROR_INVALID_SIZE
      wrong video format size
      static int ASI_ERROR_OUTOF_BOUNDARY
      the startpos is out of boundary
      static int ASI_ERROR_TIMEOUT
      timeout
      static int ASI_ERROR_VIDEO_MODE_ACTIVE 
      static int ASI_SUCCESS 
      int intVal
      integer value, should be equal to ASI_SUCCESS, ASI_ERROR_INVALID_INDEX, ASI_ERROR_INVALID_ID and so on.
